reasons: The deliberation surface now renders a deterministic transcript session with moderator framing, ordered agent turns, visible reasoning, non-binding votes, and consensus output.
Candidate actions are still tied to work packets, projects, manual candidates, motion follow-ups, and planned toolchain targets using the shared repo-plus-surface-plus-optional-project model.
jai-pilot and vscode-nexus remain planned-only targets, and the next-motion recommendation is copy-only with explicit operator authorization requirements.
Required gates passed, no API or DB mutation was added, no runtime or proof files changed, and no existing motion packages were modified.
No execution, branch write, PR creation, dispatch, scheduler, credential enablement, or cross-repo mutation capability was introduced.
